title: HTML Link Semantics, Base URLs, Relations, and Discovery Decisions · Independent Type Trial
summary: An independent municipal service owner supplies a different origin, markup family, dynamic boundary, accessibility need, resource budget, and injected failure and transfers html link semantics, base urls, relations, and discovery decisions into a changed semantic link-discovery ledger. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of semantic link-discovery ledger with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Enumerate link-bearing HTML elements and distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, form, media, and embedded destinations.
Apply first-valid-base rules against the final response URL and retain base source and rejected alternatives.
Interpret rel tokens, download, target, media, hreflang, canonical, alternate, and nofollow under an explicit discovery policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Link Bearing Elements
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab TypeScript team handles case 2108 during an origin-fairness and event-loop capacity rehearsal. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to classify link-bearing elements, base and relation semantics, rejected references, and discovery provenance; owner authorization and revocation must remain separate from robots and legal-review claims; then change one owner permission, seed, URL, robots, sitemap, redirect, DNS, media, or encoding decision and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?
